scripts.generated:check: pnpm run prepare:local-cli && pnpm --filter './examples/*' build && node scripts/check-generated.mjs
scripts.quality: pnpm check && turbo run typecheck test
scripts.release: pnpm run prepare:local-cli && pnpm quality && pnpm build && pnpm pack:check && changeset publish
scripts.verify: pnpm check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm generated:check && pnpm --filter './examples/*' check && pnpm --filter './examples/*' openapi:check && scripts/scaffold-error-smoke.sh && pnpm pack:check
